fields.label: Audio Device
fields.description: ALSA audio input device name (e.g., 'default', 'pipewire', 'sysdefault:CARD=Pro'). Run 'arecord -L' to see all available devices.

fields.label: Acronym Detection
fields.description: Convert letter-by-letter patterns to acronyms (e.g., 'a p i' → 'API'). ~2ms overhead.

fields.label: Capitalization
fields.description: Capitalize first word, pronoun 'I', and after sentence endings. ~5ms overhead.

fields.label: Grammar & Spell Checking
fields.description: Use Harper for grammar and spelling corrections (developer-friendly). ~10-20ms overhead.

fields.label: Trailing Audio Buffer
fields.description: Duration in milliseconds to continue recording after stop command (captures final words that might otherwise be cut off)

fields.label: Media Resume Delay
fields.description: Delay in milliseconds before resuming paused media after recording stops

fields.label: Audio Backend
fields.description: Audio capture backend: 'auto' (prefer PipeWire, fallback to cpal), 'pipewire' (native PipeWire for mic sharing), 'cpal' (cross-platform via ALSA).

fields.label: Idle Release Timeout
fields.description: Seconds to keep microphone open after recording stops (allows fast re-start). After timeout, mic is released for other apps. Set to 0 for immediate release.
